tools.name: read_file
tools.description: Read the complete contents of a file from the file system. Only works within allowed directories.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Path to the file to read

tools.name: read_multiple_files
tools.description: Read the contents of multiple files simultaneously. Only works within allowed directories.

parameters.name: paths
parameters.description: Array of file paths to read

tools.name: write_file
tools.description: Create a new file or completely overwrite an existing file with new content. Only works within allowed directories.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Path to the file to write

parameters.name: content
parameters.description: Content to write to the file

tools.name: edit_file
tools.description: Make line-based edits to a text file. Each edit replaces exact line sequences with new content. Returns the file content after all edits. Only works within allowed directories.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Path to the file to edit

parameters.name: edits
parameters.description: Array of edit operations with oldText and newText

tools.name: create_directory
tools.description: Create a new directory or ensure a directory exists. Can create multiple nested directories in one operation. Only works within allowed directories.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Path of the directory to create

tools.name: list_directory
tools.description: Get a detailed listing of all files and directories in a specified path. Only works within allowed directories.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Path of the directory to list

tools.name: directory_tree
tools.description: Get a recursive tree view of files and directories. Only works within allowed directories.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Path of the directory to tree

tools.name: move_file
tools.description: Move or rename files and directories. Only works within allowed directories.

tools.name: search_files
tools.description: Recursively search for files and directories matching a pattern. Searches file names, not content. Only works within allowed directories.

tools.name: get_file_info
tools.description: Retrieve metadata about a file or directory including size, creation time, last modified time, permissions, and type. Only works within allowed directories.

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Path to the file or directory
